name: 02_silver_transform_pipeline
description: Silver layer transformation: cleans, validates, and models Bronze data into Silver tables. Must run after 01_bronze_batch_pipeline completes successfully.

activities.name: Transform_Bronze_To_Silver
activities.description: Run 02_silver_transformation — validates sensor data, applies unit conversions, fills weather context, writes silver_sensor_readings_clean and silver_building_master.
